title: The Crew Rushes to Luffy
description: On pages 13–16, the crew rushes to luffy focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.
scene: On pages 13–16, the crew rushes to luffy focuses on Luffy, Buggy, Alvida, Smoker as buggy captures Luffy at the place where Gold Roger died, turning Loguetown into a crisis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: In the end of the year, the

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nahahahaha! Looks like I did survive!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: FLOP!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How lucky!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey... do you believe in God?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Thank good- Ness.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: enough talking and let's leave this town already.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We've got more trouble heading our way.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Surround the town square! Corner all the pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They're here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Run for it!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Which way!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "AWhy did he smile...? Did he know that he would be saved!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At that, instant, he realized that his very life would come to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He came to terms with his death, and smiled!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Captain! Shouldn't we...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Hey... Have you ever seen a pirate who smiled at his execution stand?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: s... smile!? I'm sure even the most wicked pirate would turn pale and cover at the moment of his death.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: But that's exactly what that straw-hat boy did! He smiled!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He smiled the same way that the pirate king did,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 22 years ago in that very same spot!

summary: This part turns Loguetown into a trap, bringing old enemies and Marine pressure together around Luffy.
